title: phegopteris rupestris
intro: Phegopteris rupestris, also known as Mountain Fern or Rocky Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that grows in mountainous regions and is characterized by its fronds with two distinct pinnae. The medicinal properties of Phegopteris rupestris include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension, fever, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits such as antioxidant and antimicrobial properties.
